Meta.title: USA Latino Prime Utah
Meta.description: Bilingual legal platform for Utah residents — Utah Legal Sandbox Phase 2

Landing.headline: Utah legal paperwork, in your language
Landing.subhead: Fill out forms for uncontested divorce, custody, housing, or business formation with step-by-step guidance. We do NOT handle immigration.
Landing.trustBadge: Operating under Utah Legal Regulatory Sandbox Phase 2

Auth.signUpSubtitle: Sign up to start your filing
Auth.signInSubtitle: Pick up where you left off
Auth.verifyBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Check your inbox (and spam folder) and click the link to activate your account.

links.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.emailTaken: An account already exists with this email.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again or contact us.

Dashboard.emptyState: You have no active cases yet.

Disclaimers.complaintBanner: This entity operates under the Utah Legal Regulatory Sandbox. If you have a complaint or feedback, contact us at support@usalatinoprime.com or report directly to the Utah Office of Legal Services Innovation: https://utahinnovationoffice.org/sandbox-customer-complaint/
Disclaimers.notALawFirm: This is not a law firm. Some of the people who own or manage this company are not lawyers. This means that some services or protections, like the attorney-client privilege, may be different from those you could get from a law firm.
Disclaimers.notALawFirmShort: We are not a law firm. We do not provide legal advice.

Consents.intro: Before continuing, we need you to confirm the following. Check each box only if you understand and agree.

is_utah_resident.text: I confirm that I am a resident of the state of Utah and 18 years of age or older.

not_a_law_firm.text: I understand that this platform is NOT a law firm and that some people who manage it are not lawyers.

no_legal_advice.text: I understand that this platform will NOT provide me with legal advice. If I need advice, I must consult a Utah-licensed attorney.

no_immigration.text: I understand that this platform does NOT handle immigration matters (visas, green cards, USCIS, asylum, deportation, citizenship, etc.).

accuracy_responsibility.text: I agree that I am responsible for reviewing and verifying the accuracy of all information I provide and of each generated document before submitting it.

ai_usage.text: I agree that the platform may use artificial intelligence (Google Gemini) to help organize the information I provide, knowing that I review and approve everything before continuing.

complaint_rights.text: I understand that I can submit complaints both to this platform and to the Utah Office of Legal Services Innovation at https://utahinnovationoffice.org/sandbox-customer-complaint/.

tos_privacy.text: I have read and accept the Terms of Service and the Privacy Policy (UCPA).

Consents.errorMustAcceptAll: You must accept all terms to continue.

Offline.title: You are offline
Offline.body: We couldn't load this page. When the connection is back, you can continue where you left off. If you were filling out a form, your draft is saved locally.

Footer.rights: © {year} USA Latino Prime LLC. All rights reserved.

Catalog.pageDescription: Three areas: Family (uncontested), Housing (eviction defense) and Business (LLC, DBA, contracts). You choose the service to start — the platform does not recommend.
Catalog.immigrationNotice: Important: We do NOT offer immigration services. For immigration matters consult a licensed immigration attorney.
Catalog.disclaimerInline: This service does NOT include personalized legal advice. The platform helps you fill out the form with the information you provide. If you need advice, consult a Utah-licensed attorney.

Onboarding.title: Welcome to USA Latino Prime Utah

personal.title: Personal information
personal.subtitle: We need your basic data to create your profile.

fields.fullNameHint: As shown on your official ID.
fields.phoneHint: For reminders. We do not share your number.

errors.underage: You must be 18 or older to use the platform.

residency.title: Utah residency verification
residency.subtitle: We need to confirm that you live in Utah. Upload a photo of your Utah driver license or state ID.
residency.uploadProofHint: Utility bill, bank statement or lease — last 60 days.
residency.submittedBody: An administrator will review your information in 1-2 business days. We will email you.
residency.invalidType: File type not accepted. Use JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF.

consents.title: Important terms
consents.subtitle: Check each box only if you understand and agree. We cannot continue without these terms.

tutorial.title: How the platform works
tutorial.step1: You choose the service you need from the catalog.
tutorial.step2: You fill out a step-by-step form with your answers.
tutorial.step3: You review the generated document before filing.
tutorial.step4: You pay manually (cash, Zelle, transfer, check) and our admin verifies.
tutorial.step5: If you need legal advice, we connect you with a Utah-licensed allied attorney.

language.title: Preferred language
language.subtitle: You can change it anytime from your profile.

Onboarding.completeBody: You can now explore the available services.

Identity.rejectedNotice: Your verification was rejected. Reason: {reason}. You can resubmit your documents.

Filing.tabSubtitle: Official intake and case filing procedures, organized by Utah district.
Filing.uplDisclaimer: This platform is NOT a law firm and does NOT provide legal advice. We only help you fill out and file official Utah Courts forms that you review and sign. We operate under the Utah Legal Regulatory Sandbox Phase 2.
Filing.complaintsLeadIn: To report complaints or feedback about this platform, contact us or report directly to the Utah Office of Legal Services Innovation:

stage1.heading: Stage 1 — Filing intake
stage1.subheading: Administrative steps to deliver your case to the court.

stage2.heading: Stage 2 — Case filing
stage2.subheading: Substance of the process after submission.

fees.waiverHint: You can request a fee waiver using form {code} (Motion to Waive Fees).

forms.heading: Official utcourts.gov forms
forms.name: Name
forms.empty: No forms found for this service in this district.

Filing.noStepsYet: No steps loaded for this district yet. Contact support.

countyPicker.title: Confirm your county
countyPicker.subtitle: We couldn't auto-resolve your county. Select it to continue.
countyPicker.label: County
countyPicker.suggestion: We detected you mentioned "{city}", but it's not in our list. Pick your county from the dropdown.

notReady.title: Not ready to file yet
notReady.body: The current case status is "{status}". The filing tab is enabled once the case is approved or finalized after QA review.

serviceNotSupported.title: Service not yet covered
serviceNotSupported.body: The service "{service}" does not have a filing procedure loaded yet. Notify the team to add it.

errors.missing_address: We don't have a verified address. Upload your ID or select your county manually.
errors.identity_not_approved: Your identity verification is not approved yet. Wait for the team to confirm.
errors.out_of_state: The address on file is not in Utah. Confirm your filing county manually.
errors.city_not_recognized: The city on your ID isn't in our list. Pick your county manually.
errors.invalid_county: The selected county is not valid.
errors.service_not_supported: This service does not have a filing procedure yet.
errors.case_status_invalid: The case is not ready to file yet.
errors.venue_violation: Venue rules suggest filing in a different county. Verify with the self-help center.
errors.form_unavailable: An official form is not available. Use the utcourts.gov link.
errors.internal_error: An internal error occurred. Try again or contact support.

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.comingSoon: Detailed metrics coming in future sprints.

identity.title: Identity verifications
identity.rejectReasonRequired: You must provide a reason before rejecting.

catalog.title: Service catalog
catalog.subtitle: Editing the public catalog. Changes are audited.
